# Future of SEO: How AI is reshaping it

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-07-20 13:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 947

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Is your organic traffic steadily declining?

You're not alone. Users are increasingly getting answers to their
queries directly on Google WITHOUT clicking through to any
website, known as zero-click searches.

With the introduction of Google's AI Overviews, this trend has
accelerated dramatically.

The reality? This trend is here to stay and will only continue
growing.

If your SEO approach hasn't evolved yet in this age of zero-click
searches, you're already falling behind the competition.

To help you adapt to the new search reality, my team has
published a detailed guide on Google AI Overviews and what it
means to WordPress users 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..HQcopQvXcgEUzi8AOSRYSFf7KBcTL8CJFSaTCPbrUzQ )
.

If you want to learn more about how AI is reshaping SEO and what
trends you should be keeping an eye on, then read the article
below.

👉 The future of SEO: How AI is reshaping Google Search 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..699ocf2sqwQrya1-5Us4mj5aRqSZxoPbQsW3EDyCFWU )
 👈

Will AI search traffic surpass traditional search?
---------------------------------------------------

According to Semrush, AI search traffic will surpass traditional
search by the end of 2027!

This is why smart website owners are now shifting their focus to
LLM seeding.

Just as SEO is the practice of optimizing your website for search
engines, LLM Seeding is the practice of publishing content in the
formats and places that LLMs (Large Language Models) are most
likely to scrape, summarize, and cite.

This strategy helps insert your brand into AI tools'
conversations, increasing your brand awareness and encouraging
them to cite your website as a source.

All in One SEO (AIOSEO) ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..uYIIfEsGDwV0cjITv-3L_McC_QFgmeBEsSH1SQwkXVg ), the best SEO
plugin for WordPress, now lets you create an LLMs.txt file for
your site. It helps AI engines discover your content more
easily.

My team at AIOSEO is constantly enhancing the plugin's features
to stay ahead of the evolving search and AI landscape.

AIOSEO's most powerful features are available in the premium
version ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..uYIIfEsGDwV0cjITv-3L_McC_QFgmeBEsSH1SQwkXVg ). But if you’re on a budget, you
can try the free plugin 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..PYPd49FNyqC0YFFt_5KmSh3crfVv6XFMiIGePhLR4PQ ) here.

Talk soon,
